# BRAHMA Department - Standard Operating Procedures

## Product Development Lifecycle

### 1. Ideation
1. Gather feature requests from users
2. Analyze market trends
3. Brainstorm solutions
4. Evaluate feasibility
5. Prioritize ideas

### 2. Validation
1. Define success metrics
2. Create user stories
3. Design prototypes
4. Conduct user research
5. Validate with stakeholders

### 3. Development
1. Write detailed specifications
2. Break down into tasks
3. Coordinate with engineering
4. Track progress
5. Regular reviews

### 4. Testing
1. Internal testing
2. Beta release to select users
3. Gather feedback
4. Iterate based on feedback
5. Performance testing

### 5. Launch
1. Prepare go-to-market materials
2. Train support team
3. Gradual rollout
4. Monitor metrics
5. Gather user feedback

### 6. Optimization
1. Analyze usage data
2. Identify improvement areas
3. Plan enhancements
4. Iterate continuously
